welcome_description:
Hello {user},
welcome to Ecliptyx Account Gen/Giveaway Server!
This is where we run giveaways and also where you can find our account gen bot!
rules_text:
- Follow the Discord ToS and Community Guidelines
-# **Punishment:** depends on the severity of the violation
- Do not use alts to join a giveaway multiple times
-# **Punishment:** blacklist from future giveaways
- Do not beg staff for roles or Nitro
-# **Punishment:** mute

-# All members and staff are required to follow these rules.
